markdown:
#  What are the default commitment statuses in Procore? 
##  Answer 
In Procore's Project level Commitments tool, the [default](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) statuses that can you can assign to a [commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) are as follows:
  * Purchase Orders
  * Subcontracts


### Purchase Orders
This table details Procore's default statuses for purchase orders. Assuming you are using the [Procore Standard Budget View](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/about-the-procore-standard-budget-view), it also shows when are where commitment amounts are reflected in the project's Budget tool.  
| Draft 1  | The purchase order is being drafted.  | ![X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/88db2116a2dd953f198467b151abaa5a/a66163f775f180ac9f3dd7a9feba5709/x.png?fm=webp&h=8)  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| Processing  | The purchase order is being processed by the 'Contract Company.'  | Pending Cost Changes Projected Costs  |  
| Submitted  | The purchase order is submitted for processing.  | Pending Cost Changes  |  
| Partially Received  | The purchase order is partially fulfilled by the 'Contract Company.'  | Pending Cost Changes  |  
| Received  | The purchase order is fulfilled by the 'Contract Company.'  | Pending Cost Changes Projected Costs  |  
| Approved  | The purchase order is approved.  | Committed Costs  |  
| Closed  |  Your project team decides how to use this status on the project. Optional definitions include:
  * The purchase order is completed and invoiced.   
OR
  * The purchase order is null and void.

 | ![X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/88db2116a2dd953f198467b151abaa5a/a66163f775f180ac9f3dd7a9feba5709/x.png?fm=webp&h=8)  |  
1 This is the default status for a new purchase order.
2 To learn more about contract amounts in Procore's Standard Budget View, see [About the Procore Standard Budget View](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/about-the-procore-standard-budget-view).
* * *
### Subcontracts
This table details Procore's default statuses for subcontracts. Assuming you are using the [Procore Standard Budget View](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/about-the-procore-standard-budget-view), it also shows when and where commitment amounts are reflected in the project's Budget tool.  
| Draft 1  | The contract has been created and its content is being drafted.  | ![X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/88db2116a2dd953f198467b151abaa5a/a66163f775f180ac9f3dd7a9feba5709/x.png?fm=webp&h=8)  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| Out for Bid  | The contract has been sent to the 'Contract Company' for a bid.  | ![X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/88db2116a2dd953f198467b151abaa5a/a66163f775f180ac9f3dd7a9feba5709/x.png?fm=webp&h=8)  |  
| Out for Signature  | The contract is awaiting signature.  | Pending Cost Changes  |  
| Approved  | The contract has been approved.  | Committed Costs  |  
| Complete  | The contract has been approved and the work is complete.  | Committed Costs  |  
| Terminated  | The contract has been terminated. Only use this status when no work has been performed on the project.  | ![X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/88db2116a2dd953f198467b151abaa5a/a66163f775f180ac9f3dd7a9feba5709/x.png?fm=webp&h=8)  |  
| Void  | The contract is no longer valid.  | ![X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/88db2116a2dd953f198467b151abaa5a/a66163f775f180ac9f3dd7a9feba5709/x.png?fm=webp&h=8)  |  
1 This is the default status for a new subcontract.
2 To learn more about contract amounts in Procore's Standard Budget View, see [About the Procore Standard Budget View](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/about-the-procore-standard-budget-view).
## See Also
  * [What are the default columns in the Contracts tab of the Commitments tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-default-columns-in-the-contracts-tab-of-the-commitments-tool)
  * [What are Procore's standard budget views?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-procores-standard-budget-views)
  * [What is a 'Procore Pay Agreement'?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-procore-pay-agreement)
title: What are the default commitment statuses in Procore?
description: Describes the default statuses for commitments in Procore.
